title: Mice In Council
content:
Against Cat sat a Council of Mice.
    Every Mouse came out prompt with advice;
    And a bell on Cat's throat
    Would have met a round vote,
    Had the bell-hanger not been so nice.

    The Best Policy Often Turns On An If
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Mice In Council"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
